response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-01:08: Identified the song 'モニタリング' (Monitoring) by DECO*27 via context clues and search. Performed by IRyS and Ouro Kronii. 2. 01:08-04:59: Identified the song 'GO BEAT CRAZY' by Fastway (Writers: Stefano Castagna, Christian Codenotti, Evelina Somenzi) via on-screen credits. Performed by IRyS, Hakos Baelz, and Ouro Kronii. 3. Used web search to retrieve full lyrics for both songs. 4. Constructed the final JSON response with accurate timestamps and escaped quotes.
response.global_summary: The video features two musical performances by Hololive VTubers IRyS, Hakos Baelz, and Ouro Kronii. The first song is a remix of 'Monitoring' (モニタリング) by DECO*27, and the second is the eurobeat track 'GO BEAT CRAZY' by Fastway.

scenes.description: The first performance features IRyS and Ouro Kronii singing 'Monitoring' (モニタリング). The song's original artist is DECO*27.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hey, I know you're "crying" all alone, I know it.
You're trembling, and your voice is leaking out.
If I say it honestly, it's already obvious, if you say it, are you listening?
It's normal, normal, I'm fine, right? Everyone just doesn't understand.
"Hello? Hey... are you okay? ... Hmm, I'm worried, so I'm coming over now."
Hey, I know you're "crying" all alone, I know it.
You're down in the dumps, sobbing, is singing solo to vent okay?
Until the morning comes, let's talk and cry more.
I'll accept it no matter how many times.
Don't hold back anymore, let it all out.
Mwah!
I want you, please.
Let me comfort you, best friend, with the talent of love.
Will you cry for me? I want to hug your pain.
Hey, is that okay? I want to share it and overcome it.
Mwah!
I want you, please.
Laugh it off, hop, step, jump, let's go.
Will you share with me your heavy, dark thoughts?
Hey, is that okay? I want to be by your side and save you.
I want to see... inside you.
Hey, I know you're frustrated all alone, I know it.
Sobbing, until it ends, I will never give up on you.
Hey, I know you're a capable kid, I know it.
When you're struggling, it's just fine to be weak; I'm on your side.
Mwah!
I want you, please.
Call my name, I'll always come to see you.
Are you alone? That's wrong, you're not alone.
Is that enough now?
Solo play is over, I tell you.
Whenever you are, I'm on your side.
I'm always watching over you, yeah, you don't need to be afraid.
Mwah!
I want you, please.
Let me comfort you, best friend, with the talent of love.
Will you cry for me? I want to hug your pain.
Hey, is that okay? I want to share it and overcome it.
Mwah!
I want you, please.
Laugh it off, hop, step, jump, let's go.
Will you share with me your heavy, dark thoughts? I want to remove them.
I want to absorb it and save you, I tell you.
Hey, I know you're "crying" all alone, I know it.
You're down in the dumps, sobbing, is singing solo to vent okay?
Together forever, let's cry more.
I'll accept it no matter how many times.
Don't hold back anymore, let it out, I tell you.

scenes.description: The second performance features IRyS, Hakos Baelz, and Ouro Kronii singing 'GO BEAT CRAZY' by Fastway.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Beat beat baby
Music gets you crazy
Shock me tonight
Go beat crazy!
Fun fun baby
Dancin' feelin' hazy
Shake out of sight
Go beat crazy!
And you will spin in a trance
No lovely dovey romance
If you wanna go crazy
Keep on movin' your body 'round
I just wanna feel you go mad
Everybody dance
Everybody groove
Everybody go, go
Go beat crazy!
Step into the dance
Get into the groove
And let the party go
Go beat crazy!
Boom boom baby
Come and shake your booty
Dig it tonight
Go beat crazy!
Go go baby
Show me that you're ready
Get satisfied
Go beat crazy!
